fields.title: Unify Ralph and autoresearch on one loop engine
fields.description:
Implement the redesign in /home/ribelo/projects/ribelo/tau/docs/adr/2026-04-12-unified-loop-engine-for-ralph-and-autoresearch.md.

Build one shared loop engine with two workflow specializations: Ralph for generic multi-iteration execution and autoresearch for benchmarked experimental work. Replace the current parallel architectures with canonical .pi/loops/** storage, task-local markdown plus state, controller-owned fresh child sessions, immutable autoresearch phases, a two-tool autoresearch execution surface, and isolated VCS handling.

This epic supersedes the old cwd-global autoresearch direction. Child tasks must be implementable from their own descriptions without requiring the ADR, but should stay aligned with the ADR as the source of architecture context.
